TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2014 MITSUBISHI LANCER EVOLUTION. THE CONTACT STATED THAT WHEN THE CLUTCH PEDAL WAS DEPRESSED, AN ABNORMAL CLICKING SOUND EMITTED FROM THE VEHICLE. THE CONTACT INSPECTED THE VEHICLE AND DISCOVERED THAT BRAKE FLUID WAS LEAKING INSIDE THE VEHICLE ONTO THE FLO

narrative.headline: What 2014 Mitsubishi Lancer owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 23 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (39% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
